{
  "nbformat": 4,
  "nbformat_minor": 0,
  "metadata": {
    "colab": {
      "provenance": []
    },
    "kernelspec": {
      "name": "python3",
      "display_name": "Python 3"
    },
    "language_info": {
      "name": "python"
    }
  },
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": null,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "SJxd2s9iVeEH"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "#project no. 5   sales and performance dashboard\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Import required libraries\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "iL_dMz1ge8_L"
      },
      "execution_count": 1,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 1: Create sample sales data\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "# We are creating a dictionary with sample company sales data.\n",
        "# Each list represents one column of the dataset.\n",
        "\n",
        "data = {\n",
        "    \"Salesperson\": [\"Rahul\", \"Priya\", \"Aman\", \"Neha\", \"Rahul\", \"Priya\", \"Aman\", \"Neha\"],\n",
        "    \"Product\": [\"Laptop\", \"Mouse\", \"Keyboard\", \"Laptop\", \"Keyboard\", \"Mouse\", \"Laptop\", \"Mouse\"],\n",
        "    \"Month\": [\"January\", \"January\", \"January\", \"January\", \"February\", \"February\", \"February\", \"February\"],\n",
        "    \"Units Sold\": [5, 20, 15, 4, 18, 25, 6, 30],\n",
        "    \"Unit Price\": [50000, 500, 1000, 50000, 1000, 500, 50000, 500]\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "# Convert dictionary into a DataFrame\n",
        "df = pd.DataFrame(data)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "fVGM-iTNfTML"
      },
      "execution_count": 2,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 2: Create a new column for Total Sales\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "# Total Sales = Units Sold × Unit Price\n",
        "\n",
        "df[\"Total Sales\"] = df[\"Units Sold\"] * df[\"Unit Price\"]"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "jCkGnbKxflIj"
      },
      "execution_count": 3,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 3: Show complete dataset\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "print(\"===== SALES DATASET =====\")\n",
        "print(df)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "7Zkrklmcfm-z",
        "outputId": "c186d812-1233-476a-e20d-d87907e834ed"
      },
      "execution_count": 4,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "===== SALES DATASET =====\n",
            "  Salesperson   Product     Month  Units Sold  Unit Price  Total Sales\n",
            "0       Rahul    Laptop   January           5       50000       250000\n",
            "1       Priya     Mouse   January          20         500        10000\n",
            "2        Aman  Keyboard   January          15        1000        15000\n",
            "3        Neha    Laptop   January           4       50000       200000\n",
            "4       Rahul  Keyboard  February          18        1000        18000\n",
            "5       Priya     Mouse  February          25         500        12500\n",
            "6        Aman    Laptop  February           6       50000       300000\n",
            "7        Neha     Mouse  February          30         500        15000\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 4: Basic dashboard statistics\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "\n",
        "# Total overall sales\n",
        "total_sales = df[\"Total Sales\"].sum()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Average sales value\n",
        "average_sales = df[\"Total Sales\"].mean()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Product-wise total sales\n",
        "product_sales = df.groupby(\"Product\")[\"Total Sales\"].sum()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Salesperson-wise total sales\n",
        "salesperson_sales = df.groupby(\"Salesperson\")[\"Total Sales\"].sum()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Best selling product based on total sales\n",
        "best_product = product_sales.idxmax()\n",
        "\n",
        " #Best salesperson based on total sales\n",
        "best_salesperson = salesperson_sales.idxmax()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "UZDQIZSff7ED"
      },
      "execution_count": 5,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 5: Print dashboard summary\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "print(\"\\n===== DASHBOARD SUMMARY =====\")\n",
        "print(\"Total Sales:\", total_sales)\n",
        "print(\"Average Sales:\", average_sales)\n",
        "print(\"Best Product:\", best_product)\n",
        "print(\"Best Salesperson:\", best_salesperson)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n===== PRODUCT-WISE SALES =====\")\n",
        "print(product_sales)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n===== SALESPERSON-WISE SALES =====\")\n",
        "print(salesperson_sales)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "ObJ6hHjLgHnz",
        "outputId": "fa455790-07d6-4efa-e0df-34b443dc2b60"
      },
      "execution_count": 6,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\n",
            "===== DASHBOARD SUMMARY =====\n",
            "Total Sales: 820500\n",
            "Average Sales: 102562.5\n",
            "Best Product: Laptop\n",
            "Best Salesperson: Aman\n",
            "\n",
            "===== PRODUCT-WISE SALES =====\n",
            "Product\n",
            "Keyboard     33000\n",
            "Laptop      750000\n",
            "Mouse        37500\n",
            "Name: Total Sales, dtype: int64\n",
            "\n",
            "===== SALESPERSON-WISE SALES =====\n",
            "Salesperson\n",
            "Aman     315000\n",
            "Neha     215000\n",
            "Priya     22500\n",
            "Rahul    268000\n",
            "Name: Total Sales, dtype: int64\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 6: Visualization 1\n",
        "# Product-wise sales bar chart\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
        "product_sales.plot(kind=\"bar\", color = \"purple\" , edgecolor = '000000')\n",
        "plt.title(\"Product-wise Total Sales\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Product\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Total Sales\")\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=0)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 507
        },
        "id": "oAvtaf-3gaRM",
        "outputId": "ed648e8f-5d9e-49c9-a704-0951a6b05fd6"
      },
      "execution_count": 8,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 7: Visualization 2\n",
        "# Salesperson-wise sales bar chart\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
        "salesperson_sales.plot(kind=\"bar\", color ='green')\n",
        "plt.title(\"Salesperson-wise Total Sales\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Salesperson\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Total Sales\")\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=0)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 507
        },
        "id": "pkBwjziPg3pj",
        "outputId": "e52f9f63-7aab-4a42-ac3e-7232109f403f"
      },
      "execution_count": 11,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 8: Visualization 3\n",
        "# Monthly total sales\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "monthly_sales = df.groupby(\"Month\")[\"Total Sales\"].sum()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
        "monthly_sales.plot(kind=\"line\", marker=\"*\")\n",
        "plt.title(\"Monthly Sales Trend\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Month\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Total Sales\")\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=0)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 507
        },
        "id": "NbD9FuorhARq",
        "outputId": "72dc850e-d39c-4771-f3f1-c88cfbf016ec"
      },
      "execution_count": 12,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 9: Visualization 4\n",
        "# Pie chart for product sales share\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(7, 7))\n",
        "product_sales.plot(kind=\"pie\", autopct=\"%1.1f%%\")\n",
        "plt.title(\"Product Sales Share\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"\")  # Hides the default y-label\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 685
        },
        "id": "QDL7hBc4hO-z",
        "outputId": "d5ce2024-e6ae-4e20-be9e-c634516f89bc"
      },
      "execution_count": 13,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 700x700 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 10: Top performer details\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "print(\"\\n===== TOP PERFORMER DETAILS =====\")\n",
        "top_person_data = df[df[\"Salesperson\"] == best_salesperson]\n",
        "print(top_person_data)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "HIYgMgJYhVN0",
        "outputId": "ee00cb61-e564-4d94-9b12-f12ee8c5f450"
      },
      "execution_count": 14,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\n",
            "===== TOP PERFORMER DETAILS =====\n",
            "  Salesperson   Product     Month  Units Sold  Unit Price  Total Sales\n",
            "2        Aman  Keyboard   January          15        1000        15000\n",
            "6        Aman    Laptop  February           6       50000       300000\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# STEP 11: Save the final dataset to CSV file\n",
        "# ------------------------------\n",
        "# This will create a CSV file that you can download or use later.\n",
        "\n",
        "df.to_csv(\"sales_dashboard_data.csv\", index=False)\n",
        "print(\"\\nCSV file saved successfully as 'sales_dashboard_data.csv'\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "u81Spp8ghc0L",
        "outputId": "97246e8e-b055-401b-b554-d7a6516d89ed"
      },
      "execution_count": 15,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\n",
            "CSV file saved successfully as 'sales_dashboard_data.csv'\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
